nasb.text: And Joseph awoke from his sleep and did as the angel of the Lord commanded him, and took Mary as his wife,

esv.text: When Joseph woke from sleep, he did as the angel of the Lord commanded him: he took his wife,

cnv.text: 約瑟睡醒了，就照著主的使者所吩咐的，把妻子迎娶過來；

ccb.text: 约瑟醒来，就遵从主的天使的吩咐和玛丽亚结婚，

csbs.text: 约瑟从梦中醒过来，就依照主的天使所吩咐他的去做，把他的妻子迎娶过来，
